The '''''Starsider''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] in service to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and later the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].

==History==
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] the aging [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught'']] had been rebuilt as a supply and escort [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. While stationed over [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], it was the home base of [[Twin Suns Squadron]].<ref name="DW">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref> It was present in numerous major engagements during the latter portions of the Yuuzhan Vong War, including the [[Battle of Yag'Dhul (29 ABY)|Battle of Ylesia]] and the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Starsider'' was also the name of a server—or "Galaxy"—in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
